rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:18 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76]>Ack, it's the Yiga Clan! Wait.<PageBreak><unk[4:0:12 78 111 116 105 99 101]>That mask... That's one I made!<PageBreak><unk[3:0:256]>Hey, I know you—you're the guy who
saved me.<unk[5:0]> You gave me a real jump there!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>看来你还挺享受旅途乐趣的。
总之，精神十足比什么都好！
<unk[3:0:256]>我为了去见心爱的诺波坦，
现在也还在每天四处寻找<Color=red>拉姆达的财宝<Color=white>。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>不過，看來你也很享受旅行啊。
過得充滿活力就好！
<unk[3:0:256]>我現在還是為了去見心愛的諾波坦，
每天都在努力尋找<Color=red>拉姆達的財寶<Color=white>。

<unk[3:0:7]>でも そっちも<Ruby={2:4}たび>旅を<Ruby={2:4}たの>楽しんでるようだね
<Ruby={4:6}げんき>元気そうで<Ruby={2:4}なに>何より！
<unk[3:0:256]>オレは <Ruby={2:4}いと>愛しのノボタンに<Ruby={2:2}あ>会うために
<Ruby={2:4}いま>今も <Color=red>ラムダの<Ruby={4:8}ざいほう>財宝<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:4}さが>探し<Ruby={2:4}ある>歩く<Ruby={4:8}まいにち>毎日だよ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>I'm glad to see you keeping well, at least!
You're clearly having fun on your journey.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:256]>Me, I'm still spending all my time seeking
out <Color=red>Misko's treasure<Color=white>, so that I might
return to my beloved Nobo.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 49]>哦！<unk[5:0]>你是那时候的那个小哥吧！？<unk[5:1]>
是我、是我！
就是之前你从依盖队手中救下的<unk[5:0]>
那个时尚男孩！
<unk[3:0:10]>哎呀～<unk[5:1]>当时我被他们胁迫着裁制服装，
真是太煎熬了……
要是小哥你没来救我，
真不知道我现在会是什么样子呢……

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 49]>喔！<unk[5:0]>是那個時候的小哥！？<unk[5:1]>

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 49]>Oh! <unk[5:0]>We met earlier, right?<unk[5:1]> Remember me?<PageBreak>Of course you do, nobody could forget
style this sublime.<unk[5:0]> You saved me from
the Yiga Clan!<PageBreak><unk[3:0:10]>Gotta say, <unk[5:1]>being forced to make their
costumes was really miserable.

Who knows what might've happened to
my fashion sense if you hadn't shown up?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我正在寻找大盗拉姆达留下的财宝，
等我找到了，我就去向心爱的诺波坦表白！
所谓的<Color=red>拉姆达的财宝<Color=white>，
就是藏在这附近<Color=red>洞窟<Color=white>里的<Color=red>传说中的服装<Color=white>。
<unk[3:0:268]>全身穿着SAGONO的我
拿着传说中的服装向她表达心意……
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>新潮与复古……<unk[5:0]>这种横跨时代的演绎，
不但充满心意，而且非常新颖，你不觉得吗？<unk[5:1]>
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我依然在尋找大盜拉姆達所留下的財寶，

就是指藏在這附近<Color=red>洞窟<Color=white>內的<Color=red>傳說中的衣服<Color=white>。
<unk[3:0:268]>身穿SAGONO的我，

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>I'm hot on the trail of Misko's hidden
treasure. First I get the treasure, then I
confess my feelings to my beloved Nobo!
And when I say <Color=red>treasure<Color=white>, I mean <Color=red>clothes<Color=white>!
The bandit Misko hid part of their
legendary wardrobe in a nearby <Color=red>cave<Color=white>.
<unk[3:0:268]>Just imagine it! Me, dressed entirely in
Cece, offering Nobo my love with one
hand and Misko's clothes with the other!
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>Old fashion meets new!<unk[5:0]> Romance meets
adventure! A moving scene that speaks to
love in our modern era!<unk[5:1]> That's my plan.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:12]>应该在这边的<Color=red>西北方<Color=white>吧……<unk[5:1]>
<Color=red>花柔莉亚河<Color=white>的北侧河岸有座<Color=red>洞窟<Color=white>……
<unk[3:0:1]>大盗拉姆达的财宝就藏在那里！<unk[5:0]>
虽然知道了这一点……
<unk[3:0:10]>但是<Color=red>洞窟里<Color=white>也形成了<Color=red>河流<Color=white>，根本进不去。

<unk[3:0:261]>我又不可能让SAGONO泡在水里，<unk[5:0]>
到底该怎么办呢……

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]>I won't give up though! I can't confess
my love to Nobo without those clothes!<PageBreak><Size=80><unk[3:0:268]>I see it all in my mind's eye—Nobo, as beautiful as
ever. Me, clad in legendary fashion! Aaah! There's
no way she wouldn't fall in love with me too!
There is, of course, the worry that Nobo might
attract other suitors while I'm out searching...<PageBreak>Once I've rested up, I need to find those clothes.<Size=100>

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>不过，这都是为了向心爱的诺波坦表白。

<Size=80><unk[3:0:268]>只要我在表白的时候身穿传说中的服装……
哎哟～怎么可能不成功嘛！
但是在我磨蹭的时候，也可能会有配不上诺波坦的人找上她……
等雨停了，我得立刻出发去寻找服装才行……<Size=100>

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:5]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>沿着这条路走就能走到海边对吧？<unk[5:0]>

<Color=red>1件服饰藏品<Color=white>。

会被错认成依盖队的。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:12]>還有啊……雖然這話由我來說有點怪……<unk[5:1]>

<unk[3:0:4]>你還是別穿成那樣吧？<unk[5:1]>
會被誤認成依蓋隊喔？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:12]>……あとさ オレがいうのも <Ruby={2:4}なん>何だけど…<unk[5:1]>

<unk[3:0:4]>その<Ruby={4:8}かっこう>恰好は やめといた<Ruby={2:4}ほう>方がいいんじゃない？<unk[5:1]>
イーガ<Ruby={2:4}だん>団に<Ruby={4:6}まちが>間違われちゃうよ？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]>Also, it might not be my place to say...<unk[5:1]><PageBreak><unk[3:0:4]>But maybe find a different look. <unk[5:1]>Otherwise
everyone will think you're part of the
Yiga Clan.

rows.CNzh: 不能弄湿SAGONO啊……
rows.TWzh: 不能讓SAGONO濕掉……
rows.JPja: SAGONOは<Ruby={2:2}ぬ>濡らせないなぁ
rows.USen: These are Cece brand!

rows.CNzh: 昂首前进……？
rows.TWzh: 向上走……？
rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:4}うえ>上を<Ruby={2:2}む>向いて<Ruby={2:4}ある>歩け…？
rows.USen: Walk with your eyes up...

rows.CNzh: 休息一会儿吧……
rows.TWzh: 休息一下吧……
rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:4}すこ>少し<Ruby={2:4}やす>休むか…
rows.USen: Just a little rest...

rows.CNzh: 诺波坦，等着我！
rows.TWzh: 諾波坦，等著我！
rows.JPja: ノボタン <Ruby={2:2}ま>待ってろよ！
rows.USen: Nobo, wait for me!

rows.CNzh: 下起来了！？
rows.TWzh: 下起來了！？
rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:2}ふ>降ってきたぁ！？
rows.USen: Rain?! Nooo!

rows.CNzh: 打雷真可怕！
rows.TWzh: 打雷很不妙啊！
rows.JPja: 雷はヤバい！
rows.USen: I hate lightning!

rows.CNzh: 洞窟里也形成了河流……
rows.TWzh: 洞窟內也變成了河……
rows.JPja: <Ruby={4:8}どうくつ>洞窟の<Ruby={2:4}なか>中も<Ruby={2:4}かわ>川って…
rows.USen: The cave's all flooded...

rows.CNzh: 这次一定要找到！
rows.TWzh: 這次一定要找到！
rows.JPja: <Ruby={4:6}こんど>今度こそ<Ruby={2:2}み>見つけるさ！
rows.USen: I'll find this one for sure!

rows.CNzh: 诺波坦……！
rows.TWzh: 諾波坦……！
rows.JPja: ノボターン…！
rows.USen: Nobo, my love!

rows.CNzh: 虽说知道了在海岸边……
rows.TWzh: 雖然知道在海岸邊……
rows.JPja: <Ruby={6:10}かいがんぞ>海岸沿いって<Ruby={2:2}い>言ってもなぁ…
rows.USen: The coast is pretty big...
